title: In the Grey
tmdbOverview: A covert team of elite operatives are living in the shadows. When a ruthless despot steals a billion-dollar fortune, they're sent to take it back—an impossible heist that erupts into a deadly game of strategy, deception and survival.
synopsis: In the Grey (2026) is a action and thriller film from United Kingdom and United States. It carries a 6.6 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
